title: zabelia angustifolia
intro: Zabelia angustifolia, also known as the Korean silver birch, is a deciduous shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its slender branches and dark green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zabelia angustifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using its extracts in tinctures and teas.
